meaning: n.[农]谷仓,畜棚,畜舍,机器房
examples: He strode purposefully toward the barn.
In 1979, Liquor Barn thrived as a discount merchandiser.
Their teal, barn-like tasting room is surrounded by steep hills and razor-edged desert plants.
The creak of my footsteps is the only sound as I make my way down to the barn.
